source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Gringotts, the VaultBank online banking app at http://localhost:3001 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). In the Bill Pay section, add a new biller (payee) named 'Aurora Solar Cooperative' with account number ASC-77120 and category Utilities, and save it.
